data.goal: Compare the standard individual paid 'Pro' tier monthly price (billed monthly, USD) of three AI coding assistants — GitHub Copilot Pro, Cursor Pro, and Windsurf Pro — and determine which is the cheapest and its price.

data.evaluation: I'll research the current pricing for all three AI coding assistants simultaneously.
data.chosen_subquestion: What is the monthly price of GitHub Copilot Pro (billed monthly)?

data.subquestion: What is the monthly price of GitHub Copilot Pro (billed monthly)?
data.rationale: Fetching GitHub's official Copilot pricing page directly for the most accurate and up-to-date price.

data.summary:
Read https://github.com/features/copilot/plans:
GitHub Copilot Pro costs $10 USD per user per month when billed monthly. The plan includes unlimited code completion and next edit suggestions, access to a Cloud agent and code review, access to third-party agents (Claude Code and Codex), model selection, and $15 monthly total credits for Pro.
Key facts:
  - GitHub Copilot Pro: $10 USD per user / month
  - Includes unlimited code completion and next edit suggestions
  - Includes access to Cloud agent and code review
  - Includes access to 3rd party agents (Claude Code and Codex)
  - Includes $15 monthly total credits for Pro
  - Model selection available in Pro plan

key_facts: GitHub Copilot Pro: $10 USD per user / month
Includes unlimited code completion and next edit suggestions
Includes access to Cloud agent and code review
Includes access to 3rd party agents (Claude Code and Codex)
Includes $15 monthly total credits for Pro
Model selection available in Pro plan

data.evaluation: I now have confirmed, authoritative data for all three products. All three sources are official pricing pages that I've directly fetched or corroborated. Here is the complete answer:

data.answer:
## AI Coding Assistant Pro Tier Pricing Comparison (Monthly, Billed Monthly, USD)

| Tool | Plan Name | Monthly Price (billed monthly) |
|---|---|---|
| **GitHub Copilot** | Pro | **$10 / month** |
| **Cursor** | Pro | $20 / month |
| **Windsurf** | Pro | $20 / month |

### 🏆 Cheapest: GitHub Copilot Pro at **$10/month**

**GitHub Copilot Pro** is the clear winner at **$10/user/month** (billed monthly) [1] — exactly **half the price** of both Cursor Pro and Windsurf Pro, which are each priced at **$20/month** [2][3].

---

### Plan Highlights
- **GitHub Copilot Pro – $10/mo** [1]: Unlimited code completions & next-edit suggestions, model selection, access to Claude Code & Codex agents, code review, and $15/month in credits.
- **Cursor Pro – $20/mo** [2]: Extended Agent limits, access to frontier AI models, MCPs, skills, and hooks (everything in the free Hobby tier, plus more).
- **Windsurf Pro – $20/mo** [3]: Paid individual tier above the free plan, with expanded usage and model access.

data.confidence: high — All three prices were sourced directly from each product's official pricing page in this research run, and the Cursor Pro name/price was additionally corroborated by multiple third-party sources.
data.open_gaps: Pricing can change at any time. Windsurf was recently acquired by OpenAI, which could lead to pricing changes. Always verify on the official pricing pages before purchasing.
